message:
fix(raptorq): use K' (not K) as first repair ESI per RFC 6330

The systematic encoder test asserted that repair symbols start at
ESI = K (source symbol count), but RFC 6330 §5.3.3.3 specifies that
repair symbols begin at ESI = K' (the padded source block length).
K' >= K because the encoding process pads the source block to the
next valid K' value from the systematic index table.

Fix: capture enc.params().k_prime and assert the first repair ESI
equals K' instead of K.  Updates the assertion message to reference
the RFC section for traceability.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
